# pip-audit allowlist — accepted-but-time-boxed dependency advisories.
#
# This file is CONSUMED BY scripts/pip_audit_allowlist.py, which drops any
# entry whose expiry has passed (so pip-audit re-flags it and the SCA job
# fails) and passes the survivors to pip-audit as --ignore-vuln args.
#
# Entry format (one per line):
#   <VULN-ID>  # expires:YYYY-MM-DD — <justification>
# where <VULN-ID> is a pip-audit id (GHSA-…, PYSEC-…, or CVE-…). Blank lines
# and full-line "#" comments are ignored.
#
# DISCLOSURE TENSION (KTD-1): this repo is public. Every id listed here is
# publicly disclosed as an accepted, currently-unmitigated advisory against a
# pinned StackBadger dependency, in a tool that runs with live target
# credentials. Add an entry only when the exposure of that fact is acceptable.
#
# JUSTIFICATION RULE: state only the DISPOSITION (e.g. "accepted pending
# upstream fix", "no fixed version yet"). Do NOT narrate why the CVE is
# believed non-exploitable — that reasoning is attacker-useful and goes stale.
#
# Baseline is intentionally empty: the gate blocks on ANY un-allowlisted
# advisory. Add entries only to time-box a specific accepted advisory.
